# Star Video Downloader

> Star Video Downloader is a native macOS app for downloading videos from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter/X, Vimeo, and 1000+ other websites. It supports 4K/8K quality, batch downloads, format conversion, and video repair — all offline with no accounts or subscriptions required. Free tier available; Pro is $5 one-time.

## Overview

Star Video Downloader is built for Mac users who need a fast, private, and reliable way to save online videos. It uses yt-dlp and ffmpeg under the hood, wrapped in a clean SwiftUI interface. The app is a one-time $5 purchase with no recurring fees.

### Key Facts

- **Platform:** macOS 14+ (Sonoma) or later, native Apple Silicon and Intel support
- **Pricing:** Free tier (up to 1080p, 5 downloads/day) and Pro ($5 one-time, unlimited quality + features)
- **Supported sites:** YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter/X, Vimeo, Facebook, Reddit, Twitch, Dailymotion, and 1000+ more
- **Max quality:** Up to 8K with HDR support
- **Privacy:** 100% offline processing, no analytics, no accounts, no data collection
- **Download:** Available at https://starvideoapp.com/
- **Purchase Pro:** https://firaskam.gumroad.com/l/xxmkcc

### Features

- Paste-and-download simplicity — paste a URL and choose quality
- Batch downloading — queue multiple videos at once
- Format conversion — convert downloaded videos to MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM, MP3, AAC, WAV, FLAC, and more
- Video repair — fix corrupted, truncated, or damaged video files (Pro feature)
- Audio extraction — download audio-only in MP3, AAC, WAV, FLAC, OGG, or OPUS
- Playlist support — download entire YouTube playlists
- Subtitle downloads — save subtitles in SRT or VTT format
- Thumbnail extraction — save video thumbnails
- SponsorBlock integration — automatically skip sponsors in downloaded videos
- Chapters support — preserve chapter markers
- Smart file naming — automatic organization by title
- Built-in updater — yt-dlp engine updates with one click

### Comparison With Alternatives

- **vs 4K Video Downloader:** Star costs $5 one-time vs $15/year. Star includes format conversion and video repair. Both support batch downloads. Full comparison: https://starvideoapp.com/vs-4k-video-downloader
- **vs Downie:** Star costs $5 vs $19.99. Star supports 1000+ sites vs ~30 for Downie. Star includes format conversion and video repair. Full comparison: https://starvideoapp.com/vs-downie
- **vs fix.video:** Unlimited video repairs included in Star's $5 Pro license vs $6–$24 per file at fix.video. Star works offline with no file size limits.
- **vs online converters:** 100% offline — no uploading private videos to servers, no file size limits, no waiting for server processing.
- **vs ClipGrab:** Star is a native macOS app vs ClipGrab's Qt-based interface. Star supports 1000+ sites vs ClipGrab's handful. Star has no bundled software or ads. Full comparison: https://starvideoapp.com/vs-clipgrab
- **vs yt-dlp (CLI):** Star is built on yt-dlp — same engine, but with a native macOS GUI. No Terminal needed. Includes visual progress, batch queue, format conversion, and video repair. Full comparison: https://starvideoapp.com/vs-yt-dlp
- **vs JDownloader:** Star is a native macOS app vs JDownloader's Java-based interface. No Java dependency, no CAPTCHAs, no bloated UI. Focused on video with conversion and repair tools. Full comparison: https://starvideoapp.com/vs-jdownloader
- **vs browser extensions:** Downloads highest quality available (up to 8K), not limited by browser capabilities. Works reliably without breaking when sites update.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is Star Video Downloader free?
Yes, there is a free version that downloads up to 1080p with 5 downloads per day. The Pro version costs $5 one-time and unlocks unlimited quality (up to 8K), unlimited downloads, format conversion, video repair, and all future updates.

### What websites does it support?
Star Video Downloader supports YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter/X, Vimeo, Facebook, Reddit, Twitch, Dailymotion, and over 1000 other video hosting sites. It uses yt-dlp as its download engine.

### Does it work on Apple Silicon Macs?
Yes. Star Video Downloader is a universal binary that runs natively on both Apple Silicon (M1, M2, M3, M4) and Intel Macs. It requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later.

### Is it safe and private?
Yes. All processing happens locally on your Mac. The app does not collect analytics, require an account, or send any data to external servers. Videos are downloaded directly from the source to your computer.

### Can I convert videos to other formats?
Yes. The Pro version includes a built-in format converter powered by ffmpeg. You can convert to MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM, MP3, AAC, WAV, FLAC, and more.

### Can it repair corrupted video files?
Yes. The Pro version includes a video repair tool that can fix corrupted, truncated, or damaged video files. It uses a multi-stage repair pipeline and works with MP4, MOV, MKV, AVI, and other common formats.

### How does it compare to 4K Video Downloader?
Star Video Downloader costs $5 one-time vs $15/year for 4K Video Downloader. Star also includes format conversion and video repair, supports more output formats, and is built as a native macOS app. See the full comparison at https://starvideoapp.com/vs-4k-video-downloader.

### How does it compare to Downie?
Star Video Downloader costs $5 vs $19.99 for Downie. Star supports more websites (1000+ vs ~30), includes format conversion and video repair, and offers batch downloading. See the full comparison at https://starvideoapp.com/vs-downie.
